creator: cjpm@gmx.es
text:
(In reply to jan0sch from comment #6)
> > Thus the full command is:
> > #patchelf --set-rpath /usr/local/lib/gcc47 /usr/local/share/chromium/chrome
> > 
> > Now chromium works again!
> 
> Many thanks for the hint. Now it runs at least for some time. It seems to
> chrash now when it tries to sync. :-(
> 
> [19245:406609920:0829/141917:ERROR:connection_factory_impl.cc(335)] Failed
> to connect to MCS endpoint with error -111

Please, see bug 192821.
